property.name: rpc_bind_addresses
property.description: RPC bind interface and port for Kudu master.

property.name: webserver_interface
property.description: Web UI bind interface for Kudu master.

property.name: webserver_port
property.description: Web UI port for Kudu master.

property.name: fs_data_dirs
property.description: Data directories for Kudu master. Comma-separated for multiple paths.

property.name: master_additional_flags
property.description: Additional flags appended to master.gflagfile (one per line recommended).

property.name: bootstrap_leader_override
property.description: Optional override for the multi-master bootstrap leader (FQDN). If empty, the lexicographically smallest KUDU_MASTER FQDN is elected. Only consulted when the local sys-catalog tablet is missing AND --master_addresses lists more than one master.

property.name: bootstrap_timeout_seconds
property.description: Max seconds the bootstrap leader waits for its single-master daemon to persist the sys-catalog tablet metadata to disk. The Python wrapper sets --flush_threshold_secs=10 on the bootstrap daemon so this normally completes within ~15s; the larger budget here is a safety margin for slow disks.

property.name: follower_wait_timeout_seconds
property.description: Max seconds a follower master waits for all lexicographically-preceding masters to appear as voters in the Raft quorum before giving up. Ambari dispatches the START command to all KUDU_MASTER hosts in parallel; with the bootstrap-leader needing ~15-30s and each subsequent follower-add ~10-30s, 120s is comfortably more than the normal worst case. If the leader hasn't come up in this window it almost certainly never will, so failing fast surfaces the real problem instead of holding the operation open for minutes.
